entries.title: Early hold strongly influences distribution depth
content: Videos with stronger first-second clarity usually unlock deeper recommendation distribution.
Fast context plus clear outcome framing tends to improve qualified watch-through.
entries.action_hint: State the payoff in the first 1-2 seconds before any setup detail.

entries.title: Specific hooks outperform generic openers
content: Concrete hooks that promise one clear outcome tend to outperform broad intros.
Showing proof quickly reduces early drop-off.
entries.action_hint: Replace generic opening lines with one precise promise plus immediate proof shot.

entries.title: Pattern interrupts help protect mid-video retention
content: One deliberate format shift around the middle of the video can reduce passive scrolling.
Visual or narrative contrast points often stabilize completion rate.
entries.action_hint: Insert one mid-video pattern interrupt (angle change, text beat, or pacing shift).

entries.title: Specific comment prompts drive higher response quality
content: Specific CTAs usually outperform broad asks like 'let me know what you think'.
Binary or short-answer prompts lower friction and increase interaction rate.
entries.action_hint: End with a direct, one-step comment prompt that is easy to answer in one sentence.

entries.title: Top creators keep repeatable format signatures
content: High-performing creators often repeat a recognizable structure while rotating topics.
Consistency in hook style and cadence improves audience expectation and return behavior.
entries.action_hint: Define one repeatable format template and reuse it across posts for 2-3 weeks.

entries.title: Hashtag performance improves with intent balance
content: A balanced hashtag set usually includes one broad context tag plus niche intent tags.
Overly broad tag stacks can dilute relevance and reduce qualified engagement.
entries.action_hint: Use 3-5 hashtags: one context tag, two niche-intent tags, and one format/community tag.

entries.title: Quick-value formats perform well in crowded feeds
content: Formats that deliver one practical takeaway quickly tend to compete better in high-scroll environments.
Clear structure (hook, value, CTA) improves comprehension and completion.
entries.action_hint: Adopt a three-part structure: hook, one focused value block, then a direct CTA.
